title: AlphaFold核心人物John Jumper加入Anthropic
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Chubby♨️
@kimmonismus
What the fu*k!! John Jumper, one of the key figures behind AlphaFold and co-winner of the Nobel Prize alongside Demis Hassabis, is leaving Google DeepMind to join Anthropic.
Huge loss for, and an insane win for Anthropic!
What is happening, especially at google?
John Jumper
@JohnJumperSci
13h
A bit of news: After nearly 9 years, I have decided to leave Google DeepMind and join Anthropic (after taking some time to recharge). I am incredibly grateful for my time at GDM. @ demishassabis took a real chance letting me lead the AlphaFold team just six months after finishing Show more
4:46 PM · Jun 19, 2026 71.1K Views

discovery_record.discovery_summary: AlphaFold关键人物、诺贝尔奖共同得主John Jumper宣布离开工作近9年的Google DeepMind，加入Anthropic。他在声明中感谢Demis Hassabis让其博士毕业后仅6个月就领导AlphaFold团队，并表示GDM是特别的地方。主推文评价此举对Google是巨大损失，对Anthropic则是疯狂胜利。

key_excerpts.text: AlphaFold关键人物、诺贝尔奖共同得主John Jumper宣布离开工作近9年的Google DeepMind，加入Anthropic。他在声明中感谢Demis Hassabis让其博士毕业后仅6个月就领导AlphaFold团队，并表示GDM是特别的地方。主推文评价此举对Google是巨大损失，对Anthropic则是疯狂胜利。

John Jumper, one of the key figures behind AlphaFold and co-winner of the Nobel Prize alongside Demis Hassabis, is leaving Google DeepMind to join Anthropic.
Huge loss for, and an insane win for Anthropic!

John Jumper @JohnJumperSci 13h A bit of news: After nearly 9 years, I have decided to leave Google DeepMind and join Anthropic (after taking some time to recharge).
